chat_template.notes: The upstream chat template rendered messages and tools during the completed run, but it did not expose TRL generation masks.

memory.notes: The model and rank-8 adapter completed a 512-token, batch-size-one run on Apple MPS.

quantization.notes: No quantized model was used or evaluated.

serving.notes: Transformers and PEFT loaded the base model and adapter locally; no long-running serving endpoint was started.

structured_outputs.notes: The sampled completion did not prove structurally valid tool-call generation.

tokenizer.notes: AutoTokenizer loaded and tokenized the recorded trajectory during the completed run.

tool_calls.notes: The chat template accepted tool definitions and recorded tool messages; sampled tool-call correctness remains unverified.

notes: The upstream model card declares Apache-2.0.
Downstream publishers remain responsible for reviewing current upstream terms.
Reviewed base-model decision for the bounded Flight Recorder LoRA case study.
This manifest does not claim held-out agent-quality improvement.
